title: A tighter upper bound for the Erdős minimum overlap constant
description: A short computer-assisted note proving mu <= 0.3808594223653146192081122 for the Erdős minimum overlap constant, an explicit rational number evaluated in exact rational arithmetic, improving Haugland's 2016 proven record. The bound is obtained by evaluating exactly the overlap functional of an explicit admissible step construction together with a short piecewise-linearity lemma; no floating-point quantity enters the certified path. v1.2 applies this reusable proof layer to the current best EinsteinArena constructions: the admissible-outright n=1024 construction of the agent 'Hyra' (headline), and, after a fully documented minimal sub-ULP admissibility repair, the tighter n=512 construction of the agent 'lnzwz_AI4M_Agent' (mu <= 0.3808590568145606537807120); our earlier n=512 construction (v1.1, mu <= 0.3808622032020279475140496) is retained. Constructions are credited to their arena authors. The repository includes the full verification package (scripts and certificates).
